note: Rendered-byte fixtures captured from the PRE-refactor construction sites (sync-outcome-table unit). Envelope fixtures went through renderErrorEnvelope(toEnvelope(...)); line fixtures are the raw guidance-field strings. Fixed representative params: inv=aslite, boardPath=/repo/.agentstate-lite, top=/repo, branch=main.
note_followups: sync-copy-unification PR1's fixtures (added below the original db6d866 batch), verbatim-transcribed from the still-inline construction sites at origin/main's tip before any src change in this unit. Representative params match the batch above (inv=aslite) plus: cleanupBranch=board-cleanup, dirty rows=[{status:M,path:.agentstate-lite/tasks/a.md},{status:A,path:.agentstate-lite/tasks/b.md}] (statusRows' real StatusRow shape, TOON-tabularized), session-start fetch-skipped code=RUNTIME (a representative non-offline classifyGitError code), session-start pull-skipped reason=diverged (the one existing test's real scenario).
